task_desc: Fix mobile touch interaction bugs, air-tool drag state leak on tool switch, and food placement bounds -- (1) the document-level touchend handler at main.js:245-250 calls event.preventDefault() on ALL touchend events across the entire document, not just those originating from canvas interactions; on mobile, a tap produces touchstart->touchend->click and preventDefault on touchend suppresses the synthesized click event, breaking all toolbar button taps on mobile (tool selection, light toggle, help, center, clear buttons all unresponsive); fix by only calling preventDefault when the touchend relates to an active canvas interaction (e.g. isDragging is true, or track whether the originating touchstart was on the canvas), (2) if a user starts an air-tool drag on the canvas then clicks a different tool button in the toolbar before releasing, handleCanvasMouseup at main.js:282 checks isDragging && activeTool === 'air' which fails because activeTool changed, leaving isDragging=true and BRAIN.stimulate.wind=true permanently with no way to clear it except reloading; fix by unconditionally clearing isDragging and wind state in handleCanvasMouseup when isDragging is true regardless of current activeTool, (3) food placement in handleCanvasMousedown at main.js:257 uses raw click coordinates without bounds checking, so food can be placed under the toolbar (y < 44) or bottom panel (y > innerHeight - 90) where the fly is position-clamped and can never reach it; clamp food placement y to [44, innerHeight - 90] to match the fly's reachable area. Files: js/main.js.
